ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, archived, in development) */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Overall accuracy of the model */,
  "model_complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the model (e.g., simple, complex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., GHI, DHI, DNI, WS, RH) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., meteorological, environmental) */,
  "feature_source" TEXT /* Source of the feature data (e.g., sensor, satellite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_features" (
  "model_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model-feature combination */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "numb_features" INTEGER /* Number of features used in the model */,
  "RSS" REAL /* Residual Sum of Squares (RSS) for the model */,
  "R_squared" REAL /* R-squared value for the model */,
  "min_RSS" REAL /* Minimum RSS value across all feature combinations */,
  "max_R_squared" REAL /* Maximum R-squared value across all feature combinations */,
  "feature_weight" REAL /* Weight or importance of the feature in the model */,
  "feature_correlation" REAL /* Correlation coefficient of the feature with the target variable */,
  "feature_range" TEXT /* Range of values the feature can take (e.g., min and max values) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_features_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_features_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model-feature combination */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., MSE, MAE) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., error, accuracy) */,
  "metric_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric (e.g., acceptable MSE value) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_feature_id") REFERENCES model_features ("model_feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin, researcher) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., data science, IT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "version_changes" TEXT /* Detailed list of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_combinations" (
  "combo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature combination */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "combo_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature combination */,
  "features" TEXT /* List of features used in the combination (e.g., ('GHI', 'DHI')) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the combination was created */,
  "combo_performance" TEXT /* Overall performance of the feature combination (e.g., average RSS, R-squared) */,
  "combo_features_count" INTEGER /* Number of features in the combination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("combo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_combinations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
